previous_findings.verification: Only one mint Begin-where-you-are CTA renders on all three viewports. SiteFooterBlock now receives showCta={false}; the previous duplicate dark band is gone.
previous_findings.evidence: 05_qa_screenshot_{mobile,tablet,desktop}_v2.png — single CTA band immediately above footer

previous_findings.verification: Overlay swapped from bg-black/[.69] to bg-gradient-to-b from-black/55 to-black/25. Hero now shows the foliage/yoga scene clearly behind the headline; gradient still provides headline contrast.

previous_findings.expected: Circular avatar (~120-140px) + centered name + small role caption only, plain white surface, 6-col grid (per Figma desktop ref)
previous_findings.got: Rectangular 3:4 photo card with thin border, left-aligned name/role/city/years
previous_findings.fix_suggestion: Introduce TrainerProfileCard variant="avatar" (circle crop, centered text, no city/years) used by TrainersMeetAll on md+. Keep current rectangular variant for the mobile faculty grid which matches mobile Figma.
previous_findings.confidence: high — Figma desktop ref (01_figma_screenshot_desktop.png) explicitly shows circular portraits in a 6-column grid with two lines of centered copy

previous_findings.rationale: Re-examined Figma desktop reference (01_figma_screenshot_desktop.png). The Department Heads row in Figma DOES use tonal colored tiles (mint, dark green, lime) with rounded-square photos — the built output matches. The original v1 finding mis-described the Figma intent.
previous_findings.verification: Built desktop screenshot side-by-side with Figma desktop ref: 8 cards in 2 rows of 4, tonal-tile backgrounds, names below each tile — structurally identical.

Visual inspection of 05_qa_screenshot_mobile_v2.png shows the hero band cleanly terminates at the CTA pill — no italic subline. Figma mobile ref at the same crop also shows no clearly-required italic line; the v1 callout was speculative.
previous_findings.fix_suggestion: Treat as nit until product confirms an italic subline is required; ignore for this round.

previous_findings.verification: Default backgroundImage prop now points to /images/trainers/hero-bg.png. Asset confirmed present in /apps/web/public/images/trainers/hero-bg.png (3.2 MB). Hero image visibly renders on tablet + desktop screenshots; no 404 in console for that path.

previous_findings.expected: Paired-glyph framing — opening quote top-left of block, closing quote after attribution (per Figma desktop pull-quote section)
previous_findings.got: Only the opening glyph renders; no closing glyph
previous_findings.fix_suggestion: Append a closing quote glyph after the attribution line, or mirror the opening glyph to bottom-right of the block.

previous_findings.verification: titleDesktop default now reads "Meet All Our Trainers" (title case). Built screenshots show the title-cased heading on tablet and desktop.
Unchanged — all CTAs remain anchor tags with valid hrefs; no regression.
Unchanged — no rogue hex colors introduced by the fix patches.

verdict_rationale: F-003 remains a major desktop/tablet visual mismatch (rectangular cards vs Figma's circular avatars in the Meet-All grid). All other fixes from this round verified. Once F-003 ships, expected verdict is PASS-WITH-MINOR (F-007 closing glyph).
